propositions: Add a `make worktree name=<branch>` target that creates a fresh git worktree branched from freshly-fetched origin/main and provisions its local venv in one step.
The target must require a name= argument, printing usage and exiting non-zero when absent, and support an overridable dir= path defaulting to ../<name>.
Venv provisioning delegates to the canonical `make install` path (editable .[dev] install plus make hooks) rather than a bespoke pip line, and prints an activation hint.
The target must be added to .PHONY and carry a ## help string so it appears in `make help`.
docs/local-dev-env.md must reference `make worktree name=` as the one-command form of the documented manual setup.
Non-goals: direnv auto-activation, a post-checkout hook, and removing the existing manual instructions.
